mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date, CASE WHEN p.finish_date IS NOT NULL AND p.finish_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '완료'
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.project_id ) THEN '진행 중'
ELSE '신규' END AS status FROM project p
p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY p.project_id

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.project_id, inner_q.project_title, inner_q.project_describe, inner_q.created_at, inner_q.finish_date, inner_q.status, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date, CASE WHEN p.finish_date IS NOT NULL AND p.finish_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '완료'
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.project_id ) THEN '진행 중'
ELSE '신규' END AS status FROM project p
p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_id DESC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project p
p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT module_name FROM module_mapping WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_active = 'Y'
SELECT project_id, project_title, project_describe, project_identifier FROM project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project p JOIN members m ON p.project_id = m.project_id WHERE m.user_code = #{userCode}
AND p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project p WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM members m3 WHERE m3.project_id = p.project_id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM members m2 JOIN users u2 ON m2.user_code = u2.user_code WHERE m2.project_id = p.project_id AND u2.company_id = #{companyId} ) )
AND p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT DISTINCT rp.permission_code FROM members m JOIN member_roles mr ON m.member_id = mr.member_id JOIN role_permissions rp ON mr.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE m.user_code = #{userCode} AND rp.permission_code = 'k1_create'
